summary: Current-state reconciliation continues away from surface-only W-route exposure. The source now exposes composition stability as product-facing QuillenExactCategory class API, instantiates those fields for canonical MetrizableLCA strict exact sequences, connects one-fold Yoneda extensions back to exact-category inflations/deflations, and exposes the head exact maps of positive-degree Yoneda chains and PositiveChain representatives. This is real exact-category/Yoneda API progress, but not product completion because the full Yoneda Ext and bounded derived infinity-category obligations remain open.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: no OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract exists.
The exact-category core now exposes class-level composition-stability fields and the canonical MetrizableLCA instance fills them, but the complete original four-task witness is still absent.

Yoneda one-fold extensions and positive-degree chains now expose their ambient exact-category head inflation/deflation maps, but the full Yoneda Ext group obligation is not yet audited as a final positive witness.
Bounded derived infinity-category integration remains incomplete as an original-contract obligation.
remaining_work: Continue from the strengthened exact-category core and positive-chain head exact-map API into higher Yoneda Ext group integration.
Continue the bounded derived infinity-category positive witness integration only after the exact-category and Yoneda obligations are represented by honest Lean declarations.
